experiment: Concentration penalty wiring — L-1587 structural enforcement
expect: Wiring the concentration penalty (constants defined by concurrent S536 but never applied in ucb1_score) will reduce meta domain UCB1 score when it holds >10% of dispatches with below-median quality. Meta has 38% share.
actual: Meta penalized 2.07 points (38% share, 21% concentration displayed). Score dropped from ~6.5 to 4.4, moving meta from rank ~4 to rank ~8. Dispatch diversity structurally enforced — anti-mediocrity mechanism from L-1587 now active.
diff: As expected. Meta was the only domain triggering the penalty (38% share, exploit=5.169 but soul_multiplier=0.72 pushed effective position down). No other domain meets both >10% share AND below-median-exploit conditions.
lesson: No new lesson — this is structural wiring of L-1587/L-1588 findings. L-1591 already covers the dispatch diversity diagnosis.
